articles.title: Australia's most-decorated soldier vows to fight war crime charges
articles.summary: Ben Roberts-Smith has given his first statement since he was charged with five counts of the war crime of murder last week.

articles.title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
articles.summary: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.

articles.summary: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.

articles.summary: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.

articles.summary: Construction at the White House is expected to continue until the next hearing, due in June.

articles.summary: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.

articles.summary: President Macron blames the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denies "any connection" to the incident.
